meta.title: Architecture Brief: Graph Footer Hook + Skills CMS
meta.description: Four architecture decisions for entity status propagation, skills CMS backend, editorial surface, and publish targets — with 6-phase implementation plan and risk matrix.

props.title: Graph Footer Hook + Skills CMS
props.subtitle: Four decisions that connect entity lifecycle, queryable storage, editorial workflow, and multi-target publishing into a single event-driven pipeline.
props.meta: Proposed  |  2026-04-10  |  Constraints: C1 Finitude, C2 Non-Commutation, C5 Locality

props.content: The graph layer can extract and classify entities, but it has no way to learn about status changes. 2,857 skills sit in flat files with no query surface. This brief proposes four interlocking decisions — a LevEvent-driven graph hook, a SQLite CMS backend, a CLI-first editorial surface, and a FlowMind publish chain — that close both gaps with ~560 LOC across 8 files.

props.title: What Exists
props.content:
**Graph layer** (`core/graph/`): `GraphAdapter` pipeline — extract, classify, validate, apply. 8 V0 entity types. `InMemoryGraphAdapter` reference impl.

**Storage layer** (`core/storage/`): 4 adapters (bd, notion, firestore, markdown). `CanonicalStorageAdapter` mandates emit-on-write LevEvent discipline. SQLite slot declared in spec but not implemented.

**Universal hooks**: Dispatcher architecture planned. AbstractHooks pattern defines YAML protocol descriptors — adding a hook = adding a config row, not TypeScript.

**Skills corpus**: 2,857 skills indexed in `skills-inventory.jsonl`. Taxonomy classifies into 4 operator lanes (Shape/Plan/Deliver/Close). Teaser pipeline already publishes to here.now.

props.title: What's Missing
props.content:
**No entity status hook** — lifecycle changes don't emit LevEvents. Graph can't track status.

**No SQLiteStorageAdapter** — spec slot exists, implementation doesn't. No local-first queryable backend.

**No skills CMS** — 2,857 skills in flat files. No structured query, lifecycle, or editorial workflow.

**No publish orchestration** — teasers publish individually. No gallery index, no llms.txt, no multi-target chain.

props.label: DECISION 1
props.title: Graph Footer Hook Architecture
props.subtitle: How should entity status changes reach the graph?

rows.description: Storage adapter writes emit LevEvents; EntityStatusGraphAdapter calls extract() on those events
Daemon scans .lev/ for changes, emits synthetic events
fswatch/inotify watcher translates FS events to LevEvents

props.title: Why Option A
props.content: This follows the existing `CanonicalStorageAdapter` contract exactly. The "hook" is not a new concept — it is a `GraphAdapter` that handles `entity.status.changed` LevEvents emitted by storage writes. No new abstractions. No platform dependencies. One event per write, one extract call per event.

Storage write (SQLite/bd/Notion)
  -> emit LevEvent { type: "entity.status.changed",
       data: { entityType, id, field, old, new } }
  -> EntityStatusGraphAdapter.extract(event)
  -> GraphOperation[] { type: "update_claim",
       predicate: "has_status", object: newValue }
  -> classify -> validate -> apply

props.title: Constraint Compliance
props.content:
**C1 Finitude** — Bounded: one event per write, one extract call per event.

**C2 Non-Commutation** — LevEvent is timestamped, append-only, causal_parent linked.

**C5 Locality** — Adapter only sees its own domain events.

props.label: DECISION 2
props.title: CMS Backend for Skills
props.subtitle: What backend should store skill metadata for query, lifecycle, and editorial workflow?

rows.description: Implement the spec-declared slot; seed from skills-inventory.jsonl
Parse SKILL.md frontmatter as queryable records

props.title: Why SQLite
props.content: The spec slot already exists at `core/storage/src/adapters/sqlite-storage.ts`. SQLite delivers FTS5 full-text search, JSON functions for metadata, WAL mode for concurrent reads, and zero external dependencies. As a `CanonicalStorageAdapter`, every write emits a LevEvent — directly feeding Decision 1.

CREATE TABLE skills (
  id          TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name        TEXT NOT NULL,
  slug        TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  category    TEXT NOT NULL,
  lane        TEXT CHECK(lane IN ('shape','plan','deliver','close')),
  lifecycle   TEXT DEFAULT 'draft'
              CHECK(lifecycle IN ('draft','review','published','deprecated')),
  description TEXT,
  hook_pattern TEXT,
  skill_path  TEXT,
  metadata    JSON,
  created_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at  TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  version     INTEGER DEFAULT 1
);

CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE skills_fts USING fts5(
  name, description, category, content=skills
);

props.label: DECISION 3
props.title: Editorial Surface
props.subtitle: Where do humans and agents edit skill metadata?

rows.description: Edit in Notion, sync to SQLite
Edit files directly, sync to SQLite

props.title: A + D Hybrid
props.content: Primary interface: CLI commands that write to SQLite. Both agents and humans use the same surface. Escape hatch: SKILL.md frontmatter via `lev skill sync` — a manual operation (not a live watcher) to avoid C1 concerns with continuous scanning.

lev skill create <name> --category technical --lane deliver
lev skill edit <name>                    # opens in $EDITOR
lev skill edit <name> --field hook_pattern "..."
lev skill search "fuzzy query"           # FTS5
lev skill list --lane shape --lifecycle published
lev skill publish <name>                 # draft -> published
lev skill deprecate <name>              # published -> deprecated

props.label: DECISION 4
props.title: Publish Targets
props.subtitle: Where do skill teasers get published?

rows.description: Browsable index page listing all published skills
FlowMind chains A + B + C on every publish event

props.title: Publish Chain
props.content: `lev skill publish <name>` triggers a FlowMind chain: render teaser HTML (existing), deploy to here.now (existing), regenerate gallery index from SQLite (~40 LOC), update llms.txt from SQLite (~20 LOC). Each target is an independent adapter — disable any one without affecting others.

props.title: 1. Render Teaser
props.content: skill-teaser-pipeline.flow.yaml generates HTML teaser from SKILL.md

props.title: 2. Deploy to here.now
props.content: Push to here.now/skills/<slug>

props.title: 3. Gallery Index
props.content: Regenerate index page from SQLite query of published skills (~40 LOC)

props.title: 4. Update llms.txt
props.content: Query published skills and write AI-discoverable listing (~20 LOC)

props.label: TOPOLOGY
props.title: System Architecture
props.subtitle: How editorial surfaces, storage, events, graph, and publish targets connect.

props.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Editorial["Editorial Surfaces"]
        CLI["lev skill create/edit/publish"]
        SKILLMD["SKILL.md frontmatter"]
        SYNC["lev skill sync"]
    end

    subgraph Storage["Storage Layer"]
        SQLITE["SQLiteStorageAdapter"]
        SEED["skills-inventory.jsonl\n2,857 records"]
    end

    subgraph Events["Event Bus"]
        LEVEVENT["LevEvent\nentity.status.changed"]
    end

    subgraph Graph["Graph Layer"]
        ESGA["EntityStatusGraphAdapter"]
        EXTRACT["extract -> GraphOperation[]"]
        CLASSIFY["ClassifyFn / LWW default"]
        APPLY["apply -> graph state"]
    end

    subgraph Publish["Publish Chain"]
        TEASER["skill-teaser-pipeline"]
        HERENOW["here.now/skills/slug"]
        GALLERY["Gallery index page"]
        LLMSTXT["llms.txt"]
    end

    CLI --> SQLITE
    SKILLMD --> SYNC --> SQLITE
    SEED -->|seed migration| SQLITE

    SQLITE -->|emit-on-write| LEVEVENT
    LEVEVENT --> ESGA
    ESGA --> EXTRACT --> CLASSIFY --> APPLY

    CLI -->|lev skill publish| TEASER
    TEASER --> HERENOW
    TEASER --> GALLERY
    TEASER --> LLMSTXT

    SQLITE -->|query published| GALLERY
    SQLITE -->|query published| LLMSTXT
props.caption: End-to-end data flow: editorial -> storage -> events -> graph + publish chain

props.label: IMPLEMENTATION
props.title: 6-Phase Build Plan
props.subtitle: Each phase has a natural validation gate. Do not proceed until the current phase passes.

items.title: SQLiteStorageAdapter
items.description: Implement CanonicalStorageAdapter with better-sqlite3. Create skills table + FTS5 index. No dependencies — start here. ~230 LOC across 3 files.

items.title: Seed Migration
items.description: Parse skills-inventory.jsonl (2,857 records). Validate each record against Zod schema. Upsert into SQLite. Target: <2s for full seed. Depends on Phase 1.

items.title: EntityStatusGraphAdapter
items.description: GraphAdapter handling entity.status.changed events. extract() produces update_claim operations. ~80 LOC. Depends on LevEvent shape from @lev-os/domain.

items.title: CLI Surface
items.description: Handlers for create/edit/publish/search/sync/deprecate. Surface-agnostic in src/handlers/. ~120 LOC. Depends on Phase 1.

items.title: Publish Chain Flow
items.description: FlowMind chaining teaser + gallery + llms.txt. Each target is an independent adapter. ~60 LOC. Depends on Phase 4.

items.title: Hook Registration
items.description: YAML protocol descriptor for entity status hook. Registers EntityStatusGraphAdapter via FlowMind dispatcher. ~30 LOC. Depends on Phase 3 + universal hooks dispatcher.

props.content:
graph LR
    P1["Phase 1\nSQLiteStorageAdapter"] --> P2["Phase 2\nSeed Migration"]
    P1 --> P4["Phase 4\nCLI Surface"]
    P4 --> P5["Phase 5\nPublish Chain"]
    P3["Phase 3\nEntityStatusGraphAdapter"] --> P6["Phase 6\nHook Registration"]

    style P1 fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0369a1,color:#fff
    style P3 fill:#0891b2,stroke:#0369a1,color:#fff
props.caption: Phase dependency graph — two independent tracks converge at Phase 6

props.label: BUDGET
props.title: LOC Budget
props.subtitle: ~560 new LOC across 8 files. 3 lines of modifications to existing code.

props.label: RISK MATRIX
props.title: Dependencies and Risks
props.subtitle: Six identified risks with mitigations. All rated Low-Medium impact.

rows.mitigation: WAL mode + busy_timeout (5s). Single-writer is fine at current scale.
Version table + numbered migration files. `lev storage migrate` command.
Validate each record against Zod schema before import. Log and skip bad records.
Replay LevEvents since last checkpoint timestamp. Store checkpoint in SQLite.

rows.risk: Universal hooks dispatcher not built yet
rows.mitigation: Phase 6 can wait. Phases 1-5 self-contained. Register programmatically until dispatcher lands.
Already in ecosystem. Falls back to sql.js (pure WASM) if native build fails.

props.label: VALIDATION
props.title: Constraint Compliance Checklist
props.subtitle: Every decision validated against system DNA constraints.

props.title: C1 Finitude
props.content: All operations bounded: busy_timeout, query LIMIT, FTS5 rank cutoff. One event per write, one extract per event.

props.title: C2 Non-Commutation
props.content: Every write emits a timestamped, append-only LevEvent with causal_parent linkage. Event ordering preserved.

props.title: C5 Locality
props.content: Each adapter scoped to its own domain events. No cross-domain leakage or global state pollution.

props.title: Local-First
props.content: SQLite with zero cloud dependencies. All data lives on the local filesystem. WAL mode for concurrent reads.

props.title: Contract-First
props.content: Implements existing CanonicalStorageAdapter and GraphAdapter interfaces. No new abstractions needed.

props.title: No Barrel Re-exports
props.content: Each module owns its API surface. Shared types in @lev-os/domain, utils in @lev-os/utils.
